Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sadesthenes]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Sadesthenes is a person who once spoke about wisdom and gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Sadesthenes is known for the saying: 'The fool seeks out combat, but the wise man stays at home.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Sadesthenes is a figure whose words regarding governance and war remain true.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Sadesthenes provides philosophical advice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Sadesthenes is a philosopher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Sadesthenes once said that the path to unity can only end in one Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Sadesthenes is a figure quoted by Calder regarding combat philosophy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Sadesthenes said that a successful man visualizes success rather than failure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Sadesthenes once said that a Reader's weapons are all around them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Sadesthenes said, 'When in doubt, seek first to preserve life.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Sadesthenes once said that nothing lasts forever.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Sadesthenes was a great historian and philosopher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Sadesthenes is a source of wisdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — A contemporary of Sadesthenes wrote that a man shows weakness when he casts shame on his ancestors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Sadesthenes is a classic author.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Sadesthenes once wrote that a true leader's words are not easily ignored.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Sadesthenes said that a wise man does not hesitate when faced with necessity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Sadesthenes said, 'To be the Emperor is to carry the Empire.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Sadesthenes said, "The wise man plans for his death, but does not plan to die."}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Sadesthenes is the author of the quote 'The quality of mercy is among the rarest of virtues, and rarest of all in killers and kings.'}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
